title: Doom's It's Still Explosive
description: Makes the item form of explosives actually explosive!
body:
# It's Still Explosive

Ever wondered why you can dispose of explosive items like TNT or TNT Minecarts in lava or fire without them detonating? Well I have and I have decided to make this mod to fix this inconsistency. When throwing a TNT item into lava or fire it will explode! What cool traps can you come up with using this feature?

## Features

- Make TNT, TNT Minecarts and gunpowder explode when destroyed in fire or lava
- Explosions scale by item stack size

### Planned
- If on fire but not destroyed make the TNT play the ignition
- Config for how explosive items are and how much it scales

## Usage

Just install this mod and throw some TNT into fire and watch what happens! This mod can run only on the server side so it does not require the client to have it installed as well! Plugin soon?

### Requirements

This mod does not require any other mods to run. Just make sure it supports the version and modloader you want to use.

## Support

Support can be provided on my [discord server](https://discord.gg/ydGK5jYV6t) or you can report any bugs on the GitHub repository [here](https://github.com/JustDoom/VillagerInABucket/issues)
